summary: The diff implements most of the required changes for REQ-36, REQ-37, and REQ-38. The backend claimAdmin, checkAdminStatus, and resetAdmin functions are correctly implemented in backend/main.mo. The AdminGuard component is rewritten with inline login, admin status checking, and claimAdmin handling. However, there are some gaps: the AdminGuard uses actor.isCallerAdmin() instead of the spec-required checkAdminStatus(), the redirect to /admin after successful claimAdmin is not clearly evidenced in the truncated diff, and REQ-38's guarantee of actor re-initialization before admin-status queries is not fully proven.

missing_requirements.requirement: After successful claimAdmin, redirect to /admin on success
missing_requirements.reason: The truncated AdminGuard.tsx diff does not show a redirect to /admin after successful claimAdmin — it only shows setIsAdmin being called and query invalidation. No navigation call is visible in the available diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: After Internet Identity login, the actor is immediately re-created with the fresh authenticated identity before any admin-status queries are executed with no race condition
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminGuard calls queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['actor'] }) after login(), but there is no evidence that actor re-initialization is guaranteed to complete before isCallerAdmin is called. The useEffect on actor/actorFetching may still fire with a stale actor if the invalidation and refetch are not awaited sequentially.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo module added to handle removal of adminInitialized field via a migration runner
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention any migration module or migration runner. This file was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminGuard uses actor.isCallerAdmin() instead of the backend function named checkAdminStatus()
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-37 specifies the backend function is named checkAdminStatus, but the frontend calls isCallerAdmin(). The spec does not request renaming checkAdminStatus to isCallerAdmin.

hallucinated_features.description: handleLogin in AdminGuard includes a retry mechanism that calls clear() then login() when error message is 'User is already authenticated'
hallucinated_features.reason: This error-handling and retry behavior for already-authenticated users was not requested in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: handleLogout function with queryClient.clear() added inside AdminGuard component
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not request a logout button or logout functionality inside the AdminGuard component.
